# YOR Construction & Investments, Inc.

> YOR Construction & Investments, Inc. (Contractor) provides Additions, Bathroom Remodeling, Kitchen Remodeling, Pools, Patios & Decks serving Los Angeles, Alta Loma, Athens, Baldwin Hills, Bell Gardens

## About
- Name: YOR Construction & Investments, Inc.
- Website: https://yorconstruction.com
- Industry: Contractor
- Services: Additions, Bathroom Remodeling, Kitchen Remodeling, Pools, Patios & Decks, Patio Enclosures & Covers, Roofing, Cement and Concrete, Stucco Contractor, Exterior Painting, Patio Covers Los Angeles, Seismic Retrofitting Los Angeles, Commercial Contractor, Full House Remodeling, Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU)
- Service areas: Los Angeles, Alta Loma, Athens, Baldwin Hills, Bell Gardens, Bellflower, Burbank, Calabasas, Topanga, Canoga, Canyon Country, Carson, Castaic, Chatsworth, Chino, Compton, Corona, Culver City, Downey, Eagle Rock, Florence, Gardena, Glendale, Granada Hills, Harbor City, Hawthorne, Hermosa Beach, Huntington Park, Hyde Park, Inglewood, La Mirada, La Verne, Lawndale, Leimert Park, Lomita, Los Feliz, Lynwood, Manhattan Beach, Maywood, Moorpark, Newhall, North Hollywood, Northridge, Oxnard, Pacoima, Paramount, Pico Rivera, Port Hueneme, Redondo Beach, Reseda, San Dimas, San Pedro, Windsor Hills, Woodland Hills
